title: [FIRRTL] Parser `< 0` always false
body:
I currently see the following warning:
```
../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Import/FIRLexer.cpp: In member function ‘circt::firrtl::FIRToken circt::firrtl::FIRLexer::lexInlineAnnotation(const char*)’:
../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Import/FIRLexer.cpp:323:17: warning: comparison of unsigned expression in ‘< 0’ is always false [-Wtype-limits]
  323 |       if (depth < 0)
      |           ~~~~~~^~~
```
